Türkçe

Third Place Award in the Istanbul Is Yours Golden Horn Coast Design Competition

Led by Dr. Birge Yıldırım Okta, a faculty member of our University’s Department of Architecture, and including Gürkan Okta, a part-time lecturer in the Department of Interior Architecture, and our Architecture Department graduates Burak Arifoğlu, Özge Taşpınar, and Muhammed Aydem, the team was awarded third place in the Haliç Coastline Competition for the Haliç 3rd District with their project. – Golden Horn Shores Competition, organized by the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality Parks, Gardens, and Green Areas Directorate, for the Golden Horn 3rd Region.

We congratulate our entire team, especially our faculty members and graduates, and wish them continued success.

For detailed information about the project and project visuals:

https://www.arkitera.com/proje/3-odul-3-bolge-istanbul-senin-halic-kiyilari-tasarim-yarismasi/

For information about Istanbul is Yours – Golden Horn Coast Race:

https://konkur.istanbul/halic/
